    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Serialisierte Form

    U

    unsubscribe(String) - Methode in Schnittstelle at.jku.se.iot.IoTProtocol
    Removes a previous subscription.
    unsubscribe(String) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.iot.MockProtocolAdapter
     
    unsubscribe(String) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.iot.MqttProtocolAdapter
     
    unsubscribeFromDevice(Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.iot.IoTIntegrationService
    Unsubscribes from hardware events for a specific device.
    update(Long, RuleRequest) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.RuleResource
    Updates an existing rule (FR-10, FR-11, FR-15).
    update(Long, SceneRequest) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.SceneResource
    Updates a scene's name and replaces all its device states (FR-17).
    update(Long, ScheduleRequest) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.ScheduleResource
    Updates an existing schedule (FR-09, FR-15).
    update(Long, VacationModeRequest) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.VacationModeResource
    Updates an existing vacation mode (FR-21).
    updatedAt - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.DeviceResponse
    Timestamp of the last state change.
    updatedAt - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Device
    Timestamp of the last state change (FR-07).
    updateState(Long, DeviceStateRequest) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.DeviceResource
    Manually controls a device's state and records an activity log entry (FR-06, FR-08).
    user - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Notification
    The user who receives this notification.
    user - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Room
    The user who owns and manages this room.
    user - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Rule
    The user who owns this rule.
    user - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Scene
    The user who owns this scene.
    user - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Schedule
    The user who owns this schedule.
    user - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.VacationMode
    The user who activated vacation mode.
    User - Klasse in at.jku.se.entity
    Represents a registered user of the SmartHome Orchestrator.
    User() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.entity.User
    Default constructor required by JPA.
    userId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.RoomRequest
    Identifier of the user who owns the room.
    userId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.RuleRequest
    Identifier of the user who owns the rule.
    userId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.SceneRequest
    Identifier of the user who owns the scene.
    userId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.ScheduleRequest
    Identifier of the owning user.
    userId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.VacationModeRequest
    Identifier of the user for whom vacation mode is configured.
    userId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.NotificationResponse
    Identifier of the recipient user.
    userId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.RoomResponse
    Identifier of the owning user.
    userId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.RuleResponse
    Identifier of the owning user.
    userId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.SceneResponse
    Identifier of the owning user.
    userId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ScheduleResponse
    Identifier of the owning user.
    userId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.VacationModeResponse
    Identifier of the owning user.
    UserLoginRequest - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.request
    Request body for user login (FR-02).
    UserLoginRequest() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.UserLoginRequest
    Default constructor for deserialization frameworks.
    UserMapper - Klasse in at.jku.se.mapper
    Maps User entities to response DTOs.
    UserRegisterRequest - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.request
    Request body for registering a new user (FR-01).
    UserRegisterRequest() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.UserRegisterRequest
    Default constructor for deserialization frameworks.
    UserRepository - Klasse in at.jku.se.repository
    Repository for User entities.
    UserRepository() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.repository.UserRepository
    Default constructor required by CDI.
    UserResource - Klasse in at.jku.se.resource
    REST resource for user management.
    UserResource() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.resource.UserResource
    Default constructor required by CDI.
    UserResponse - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.response
    Response DTO for a user — never exposes the password hash.
    UserResponse() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.UserResponse
    Default constructor for serialization frameworks.
    UserRole - Enum-Klasse in at.jku.se.entity.enums
    Defines the access roles a user can have in the system.
